name: K3 Capital Group PLC
summary: K3 Capital Group PLC acts as a business sales specialist in the United Kingdom and internationally. The company provides business sale services that identify and match the sellers of SME businesses to trade, individual, and institutional buyers under the KBS Corporate brand; delivers deals to mid-market private equity and trade buyers under the KBS Corporate Finance brand; and offers business transfer services under the Knightsbridge brand. It also offers insolvency and restructuring, forensic accounting, corporate finance, pension, and financial advisory services under the Quantuma brand; and tax credit specialist services under the RandD brand. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Bolton, the United Kingdom.
